response.justification: The candidate is a senior full-stack software developer with strong web/backend experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but has no demonstrated background in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, hardware-software co-design, or deep neural network optimization. The role is a Principal Performance Architect requiring deep hardware and performance-architecture expertise that is fundamentally different from this candidate's career trajectory in product/application engineering.
strengths: 13+ years of professional software engineering experience at reputable companies
Low-latency systems experience with DLang at Dunnhumby (high-throughput HTTP services)
Polyglot background including C/C++ work at National Instruments on engineering tools
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience anywhere on the resume
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career focus is web/full-stack application development, not performance architecture or hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
